---
title: "Strata Insurtech Platform"
---

## Project Architecture & Core Layout

A high-performance, decoupled microservices architecture designed to transition traditional insurance pricing into real-time, risk-optimized premium generation.

```text
strata-insurtech-platform/
│
├── prod_freq_xgb.json       # Serialized Poisson Frequency Engine
├── prod_sev_lgb.txt         # Serialized Gamma Severity Engine
├── prod_survival_cox.pkl    # Serialized Cox Hazard Proportional Model
├── engine.py                # Core mathematical & actuarial matrix processing
├── main.py                  # High-performance FastAPI REST API endpoints
├── app.py                   # Multi-page interactive Streamlit dashboard
├── requirements.txt         # Production-locked application dependencies
├── test_pipeline.py         # Automated unit test and validation suite
└── Dockerfile               # Environment blueprint for containerized deployment
